steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “though” signals a contrast: smaller areas were less affected by traffic congestion than very large cities, yet congestion still worsened in those smaller areas over time.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the data
steps.content:
Choice A states that the delay was always lower in Allentown‑Bethlehem than in New York City, but it increased in both locations from 1990 to 2000 — matching the “less affected but worsened” pattern.
Choices B, C, and D either focus on a single value below 20 hours, cite a specific year’s figure, or reverse the size comparison, none of which capture the required contrast.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
